hero.headline: GUIDES DIRECTLY
hero.tagline: Local Guides. Direct Booking. Better Tours.
hero.subtitle: Connect directly with licensed local tour guides for authentic, unforgettable experiences across the USA and Canada.
hero.subTagline: Travel experiences created by guides, priced by guides — you pay only what your guide sets.

valueProp.label: Why We're Different
valueProp.title: Why Guides Directly is Different
valueProp.card1Desc: No markups or hidden fees — what you see is what you pay.
valueProp.card2Desc: Book and chat with guides without intermediaries.
valueProp.card3Desc: Real local guides designing real local experiences.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Tour Services
services.subtitle: From VIP private tours to group adventures, we create unforgettable travel experiences across North America.
services.vipDesc: Exclusive one-on-one experiences tailored to your interests. Our guides design a perfect itinerary just for you.
services.groupDesc: Join like-minded travelers on curated group experiences. Perfect for social adventurers seeking shared discoveries.
services.customDesc: Tell us your time and interests — we'll craft a unique route covering hidden gems and iconic landmarks alike.
services.multilingualDesc: Our guides speak Russian, English, Polish, German, French, Spanish, Mandarin, and Japanese fluently. Experience every destination in your preferred language.
services.directBookingTitle: Book Directly — Your Guide Sets the Price

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What Travelers Say
testimonials.t1: Our guide made Washington DC come alive! Speaking Russian was a huge plus — we understood every detail of American history like never before.
testimonials.t2: I paid less and got more — direct, honest pricing. The VIP tour of New York was incredible. Our guide took us to spots we never would have found on our own.
testimonials.t3: Booking direct with my guide felt personal and fair. We booked a custom family tour across three cities and the personalized itinerary was beyond our expectations.

inquiry.label: Start Your Journey
inquiry.title: Book Your
inquiry.subtitle: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours with a custom tour proposal. No commitment required — let's start planning!
inquiry.commissionFreeNote: Have questions about commission-free booking? Contact us — Guides Directly ensures direct contact with no hidden costs.
inquiry.directContact: Text or call to speak with a guide directly — no commissions, no agents.

inquiry.required: Please fill in all required fields.
inquiry.success: Tour inquiry submitted! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
inquiry.thankYouMsg: Your tour inquiry has been received. Our team will reach out within 24 hours to help plan your perfect trip.

footer.description: Commission-free tour bookings with local guides across the United States and Canada. Direct guide relationships, guide-priced tours — no middlemen.
footer.rights: Guides Directly / iGuide Tours. All rights reserved.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Who We Are
about.p1: iGuide Tours — now part of Guides Directly, a commission-free platform connecting you directly with guides. Based in Bethesda, Maryland, we specialize in private tours led by professional and multilingual local guides across major cities in the United States and Canada.
about.p2: Founded by Michael Zlotnitsky, who has over 35 years of experience in the tourism industry, the company emphasizes personalized experiences that showcase the history, culture, and cuisine of each destination.
about.p3: With a focus on VIP tours, we offer clients the opportunity to explore iconic landmarks and hidden gems alike — all in their preferred language. Whether it's a family vacation, a business trip, or a special celebration, our team crafts unforgettable journeys tailored to your needs.
about.p4: Guides Directly powered by iGuide Tours charges zero commissions, no markups, and no middlemen between you and your guide. You connect directly with local licensed guides, agree on pricing, and experience authentic travel designed by humans, not algorithms.
